name: Mercenaries 2 Lua Mods
description: Lua-based mods for Mercenaries 2. Currently in probe phase — verifying modkit deployment behavior before publishing real mods.

mods.name: [PROBE] Test ASI Placement
mods.description: Throwaway placeholder used to confirm where the modkit deploys type="asi" assets. Loads cleanly (valid DLL, DllMain returns TRUE, no side effects) — safe to install then delete after noting the file path.

mods.name: [PROBE] Test Lua Placement
mods.description: Throwaway placeholder used to confirm where the modkit deploys type="lua" assets. Not bound to any hotkey and not auto-executed by any bridge lifecycle hook — safe to install then delete after noting the file path.
